title: Backend Developer (Java)
description: We are hiring a Backend Developer who can design and build robust APIs and handle high-performance server-side logic. You will be responsible for building scalable backend systems and ensuring seamless data flow between services.
requirements:
Responsibilities:

Design and develop RESTful APIs
Build and maintain backend services using Java & Spring Boot
Optimize database queries and improve performance
Integrate third-party APIs and services
Ensure security and data protection practices
Write unit and integration tests

What makes it exciting:

Work on scalable backend systems
Opportunity to handle real production-level traffic
Exposure to microservices architecture
Ownership of backend modules

Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
Strong knowledge of Java and Spring Boot
Experience with REST APIs and backend architecture
Familiarity with MySQL / PostgreSQL
Understanding of OOP and design patterns
Basic knowledge of Docker is a plus

title: Software Engineer
description: We are looking for a passionate Software Engineer to join our team and build scalable, high-performance applications. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy modern web solutions.
requirements:
Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain web applications using modern frameworks
Write clean, efficient, and scalable code
Collaborate with designers, product managers, and backend teams
Debug, test, and optimize application performance
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions

What makes it exciting:

Work on real-world scalable products
Fast-paced startup environment
Opportunity to own features end-to-end
Exposure to modern tech stack and architecture
